Appearances:

Benson Lai, Esq. for and with Plaintiff 937-949 Clay Street Apartmentsn and with Joe Ellen Chu.
Omar Calimbas, Esq. as limited scope counsel for and with Defendant Bi Tao Xu.
The Judge Pro Tem Andrew Westley, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 503B, for settlement discussions.
Case settled, the trial date is vacated.
